name: AI ScamShield
description: AI-powered ScamShield developed for the IBM SkillsBuild Internship Project Showcase using Python Flask, IBM watsonx.ai, IBM Granite Models, LangFlow, and IBM Cloud Lite. The application detects phishing attacks, online scams, fake banking messages, malicious URLs, QR code scams, and provides intelligent cybersecurity recommendations.
author: Your Name
problem_statement: Problem Statement No. X - AI ScamShield: Intelligent Scam & Phishing Detection Agent
